instruction: Restore the arrow mark on the divide icon in the bottom-right (polyline arrow at (100,100), stroke #222, stroke-width 2).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/divide.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.499 11.998h15m-7.5-6.75h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM12 18.751h.007v.007H12v-.007Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/divide.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.499 11.998h15m-7.5-6.75h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM12 18.751h.007v.007H12v-.007Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
</svg>
